creator: dhorn2000@gmail.com
text:
`make` was clean (no errors), Both `make test` and actually attempting to run `ykman` was the failure point.

Vanilla fresh install 14-ALPHA4 from ISO
Install ykman (ports or pkg)
Failure due to "Undefined symbol "ERR_GET_FUNC""

I'm going to do a fresh install in a VM again today and see if it is reproducible.   (VMWare)
